channel.title: The Mutapa Times — Zimbabwe Property Listings
channel.description: Live Zimbabwe property listings with branded hybrid cards — photo on top, price and specs on the brand strip. One item per active listing for the Mutapa Times properties autolist.

item.title: USD 250,000 — HILSIDE with commercial in mind (Hillside, Bulawayo South)
item.description: USD 250,000 — Hillside, Bulawayo South. 6 beds, 3 baths. HILSIDE with commercial in mind. Browse all listings at mutapatimes.com/property #Zimbabwe #Property #ZimbabweProperty #RealEstate #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Property.co.zw
